Ship

Eldorado SE-24

ship
Typeship
HP900
Shield960

Media

Explosion soundexplosion2.mp3

Player Ship Profile

EnginePlayer Eldorado
Default weapons3
Base techs4
Special traits6
Base health9
Base shield8
Base shield regen8
Base armor8

The ship comes with fully upgraded shield, armor, power system, engine, and teleport device for the owners conveniences.

The ship comes with a system launching guided solid gold missiles, which attempts to ram its targets. It also come with a Flak Cannon for dealing with close range targets.

Ship Stats

Shield960
Regen80
Armor16
Radius17

Player accessBuyable ship
Known hangars7

Default Weapons

WeaponStart levelSlotType
Golden Ram Missiles SE-2401projectile
Golden Flak Cannon SE-2402smartGun
Teleport Device63teleport

Default Upgrades

TechStart levelWhat it gives
Armor6Increases health and armor amount. Armor reduces damage by its value per hit. - Can restore health. - armor bonuses scale with player level. Good vs fast hitting weapons.
Shield6Increases shield amount and regeneration rate. - Can block heavy hits. - Shield Bonuses scale with player level. Good vs hard hitting weapons.
Engine6Increases acceleration and speed. - Can boost speed. Good in PvP.
Power6Increases power regeneration and maximum power. - Can boost damage output at the cost of power. Good for dealing more damage for longer periods.

TraitBonus
Power regen50%
Refire / reload150%
Cooldown efficiency10%
Speed50%
Kinetic damage50%
Max power10%
